required: selected service ID and request transport
one or two public HTTPS manifests, static documents, or unauthenticated x402 resource URLs for the Agent Payment Boundary Review, or one Ethereum Mainnet transaction hash for case services
for the no-login $750 release-blocker form: an opaque request reference, one public Node.js or TypeScript repository URL, one public failing CI log URL, and a reply email
reply email address for email or no-login web-form transport
optional: stated role or relationship to the transaction

purposes: review and quote the requested fixed-scope public-data service
prepare and deliver an accepted evidence product
verify a quoted payment and respond to service questions
use.sharing: Infrastructure providers needed to operate email and public hosting may process the data. Google Forms and Google Drive process no-login release-blocker form submissions for storage and owner review.

processors.name: Google Forms and Google Drive
processors.purpose: store and present no-login release-blocker requests to the form owner

retention.exceptions: A shorter deletion request will be honored where practical; accounting, fraud-prevention, dispute, or legal obligations may require limited records for longer.
